cloudfront.keygroup.keygroupconfig.CfnAb:
A key group configuration.

A key group contains a list of public keys that you can use with [CloudFront signed URLs and signed cookies](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudFront/latest/DeveloperGuide/PrivateContent.html).

cloudfront.keygroup.keygroupconfig.Comme.Description: A comment to describe the key group. The comment cannot be longer than 128 characters.

cloudfront.keygroup.keygroupconfig.Items.Description: A list of the identifiers of the public keys in the key group.

cloudfront.keygroup.keygroupconfig.Name.Description: A name to identify the key group.
